warnings: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose: A Fukui reactivity analysis was performed on pyridine using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry was taken from the provided input file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`. The maximum Fukui-plus value (f⁺) was observed for the nitrogen atom, with f⁺ = 0.48422572. The calculation converged, but warnings were reported regarding sum(f±) equaling 1.0000, which may indicate minor issues in N±1 state convergence. SCF convergence for the neutral/ion species was successful. Integrity status: trustworthy.
